backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining user profiles, plan options, and subscription lifecycle logic with access control. Provides APIs to create/update profiles, select plans, record payments, and manage plan activation and expiration.
backend/migration.mo: State migration module that converts legacy user profiles into the new expanded UserProfile schema. Initializes new fields with defaults while preserving existing user identities.
feature_evidence.json: Structured report mapping implemented product features to frontend files, components, and test requirements, with confidence levels. Serves as traceability evidence for plan selection, expiration lifecycle, and account UI updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries describing the purpose of each major frontend file and component. Acts as documentation to quickly understand UI structure, hooks, and feature coverage.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind and CSS variable definitions establishing the app’s design system, color tokens, and light/dark themes. Applies base styles for background, typography, borders, and UI primitives.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets metadata, loads fonts, defines the root mount node, and bootstraps the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication flow, public vs authenticated routing, profile setup gating, and plan expiration checks on load. Coordinates navigation between Dashboard, Tools, and My Account pages.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal shown to first-time authenticated users to collect and save their name. Creates an initial user profile with default free plan and prevents dismissal until completion.
frontend/src/components/GreenButton.tsx: Reusable button wrapper that enforces the app’s primary green styling on top of the base UI Button component.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalE: Form component for creating or editing a journal entry with title and content fields, using add/update journal hooks and handling submit, loading, and cancel states.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalL: Displays a list of journal entries with formatted timestamps, edit and delete actions, loading and empty states, and a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalS: Container component that toggles between the journal list and the journal editor, managing create and edit state for journal entries.
frontend/src/components/landing/FAQSecti: Landing page section rendering a FAQ accordion with common questions about therapy, privacy, anonymity, readiness, cancellation, and app differentiation.
frontend/src/components/landing/FeatureA: Landing page sections showcasing core features and user benefits using icon-based cards and benefit items for marketing content.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Hero section for the landing page with empathetic messaging, introductory text, and a primary call-to-action button to begin for free.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingC: Wrapper around GreenButton that triggers Internet Identity login and shows a loading state while signing in.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingH: Sticky landing page header displaying the app logo and title with a sign-in button that initiates Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingS: Reusable layout wrapper for landing page sections, providing consistent spacing, optional styling, and anchor IDs.
frontend/src/components/landing/PricingS: Renders a landing page pricing section with Free, Basic, and Premier subscription cards, listing features and calls to action. Uses shared LandingSection, Card UI components, and CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/landing/PrivacyS: Displays a privacy and safety-focused landing section highlighting data protection principles, user control, and anonymity. Includes safety notices, crisis resources, and reassurance that the app does not replace professional care.
frontend/src/components/landing/SocialPr: Shows testimonial cards and supportive messaging to build trust and emotional resonance on the landing page. Includes a call-to-action button that navigates users to leave feedback or testimonials.
frontend/src/components/landing/ValuePro: Defines the core emotional and functional value proposition of the app with empathetic messaging and feature highlights. Uses icon-based cards to emphasize trauma-aware, judgment-free, and privacy-focused design.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Provides the main authenticated app layout with header navigation, logout handling, and footer branding. Integrates identity, user profile, plan hooks, and wraps content in a SanctuaryBackground.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sanctuary: Implements a full-screen rotating background with preloaded images and crossfade transitions. Wraps application content with visual overlays to ensure readability and a calming aesthetic.
frontend/src/components/mood/MoodCheckIn: React card component that lets users select and save a mood (happy/neutral/sad) and displays recent mood check-ins using backend hooks.
frontend/src/components/tools/BreathingT: Guided breathing exercise timer that cycles through inhale/hold/exhale/rest phases with countdown, cycle tracking, and start/pause/reset controls.
frontend/src/components/tools/Grounding5: Step-by-step 5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise UI that guides users through sensory prompts, collects optional responses, and shows completion feedback.
frontend/src/components/tools/ThoughtRef: CBT-style thought reframing tool where users enter a negative thought, review guiding questions, and write a more balanced reframed thought.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: React Query hooks to fetch and save the current caller’s user profile via the backend actor, handling loading state and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Authentication context and provider for Internet Identity that manages login, logout, identity persistence, and exposes login status to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useJournal.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, update, and delete journal entries via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useMood.ts: Defines hooks to fetch mood history and add new mood entries using the actor, backed by React Query with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useNewsletterOptIn.ts: Exposes a mutation hook to toggle the user's newsletter opt-in status and refresh the current user profile cache.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlan.ts: Manages subscription plan state by deriving the effective plan level from the user profile and providing mutations to select plans and record payments.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Contains hooks to fetch testimonials and submit a new testimonial through the actor, invalidating cached testimonials on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS base styles and a custom design system using CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors, typography, and layout defaults.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and imports global styles.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page layout combining a mood check-in card and a journal section with introductory headings.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page assembling marketing sections, pricing, FAQs, and a themed footer within a sanctuary-style background.
frontend/src/pages/MyAccountPage.tsx: Account management page for editing user profile details, managing subscription plans, and toggling newsletter preferences with form validation and feedback.
frontend/src/pages/SplashPage.tsx: Login splash screen with branding, username/password inputs, Internet Identity login handling, and placeholder options for alternative authentication.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Implements a testimonials page that fetches and displays user testimonials and provides a form to submit new ones. Includes a styled header, background image, and back navigation, using custom hooks for data access.
frontend/src/pages/ToolsPage.tsx: Renders a self-help tools page with tabbed exercises (breathing, grounding, reframing) gated by the user’s subscription plan. Uses plan state to enable/disable tools and prompts users to select a plan if none is active.
frontend/src/utils/plan.ts: Defines plan levels and display metadata for subscription options and provides helpers to map backend plan options to user-facing labels and plan tiers.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Provides utilities to format backend nanosecond timestamps into readable dates and to check whether a given expiration timestamp has passed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Contains helper functions to read URL parameters from query strings or hash routes and persist them in sessionStorage. Also includes utilities to retrieve, clear, and sanitize parameters for navigation safety.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Implements client-side validation for an optional date-of-birth field, enforcing MM/DD/YYYY format, real dates, and non-future values.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom themes, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins, using CSS variables for design tokens and supporting dark mode.
project_state.json: Stores structured metadata about the project’s current scope, versioned state, and implemented features, serving as a canonical snapshot of requirements and progress.
